steps.title: Identify the key clue about movement
steps.content: The phrase “without looking at the rest of us” shows Esteban moved with focused purpose in one direction, not distracted or deviating.

steps.title: Match the word to the meaning
steps.content: ”Directly” expresses exactly this — moving in one focused direction toward a destination. Justly, merrily, and truthfully describe unrelated qualities rather than directional movement. That matches choice B — B is correct.
